notes: 'erwachsen' can also be used as a verb (erwachsen aus + Dativ = to arise/result from), but its primary and most common use is as an adjective meaning 'adult' or 'grown-up'.

sentences.german: Meine Tochter ist jetzt erwachsen und lebt allein.
sentences.english: My daughter is now grown-up and lives alone.

sentences.german: Er verhält sich sehr erwachsen für sein Alter.
sentences.english: He behaves very maturely for his age.
